---
title: "Social Responsibility"
description: "Discover chen.ist's corporate social responsibility initiatives focused on sustainable practices, community development, and social impact through technology."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Social <span class="gr">Responsibility</span></h1>
    <p>Using technology as a force for good in the communities we serve.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Three pillars of impact</h2>
    <p class="sub">Our CSR approach focuses on sustainability, inclusion, and leveraging tech for social good.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-tree"></i><h3>Environmental Sustainability</h3><p>Carbon-neutral cloud operations, green office initiatives, sustainable IT disposal, and remote work policies to reduce emissions.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-universal-access"></i><h3>Digital Inclusion</h3><p>Technology education for underserved communities, accessible web design training, computer donations, and scholarships.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hand-thumbs-up"></i><h3>Tech for Good</h3><p>Pro bono consulting for nonprofits, open-source social impact projects, disaster response tech, and environmental monitoring.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Digital Literacy Initiative</h2>
    <p class="sub">Bridging the digital divide in underserved communities since 2023.</p>
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">50+</div><div class="m-nl">Workshops conducted</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">500+</div><div class="m-nl">Participants trained</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">5</div><div class="m-nl">Computer labs built</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">1,200+</div><div class="m-nl">Volunteer hours</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>GreenTech Initiative</h2>
    <p class="sub">Reducing the environmental impact of technology and promoting sustainable IT practices.</p>
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">150t</div><div class="m-nl">Carbon offset</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">2.5t</div><div class="m-nl">E-waste recycled</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">30%</div><div class="m-nl">Energy reduction</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">15+</div><div class="m-nl">Sustainable partners</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Nonprofit Tech Support</h2>
    <p class="sub">Empowering nonprofits through pro bono technology consulting and services.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-building"></i><h3>12 Organizations</h3><p>Supported with custom technology solutions and consulting.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><h3>1,000+ Hours</h3><p>Donated in pro bono technical consulting services.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-gear"></i><h3>8 Solutions</h3><p>Custom software for healthcare, education, and conservation.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i><h3>24 Sessions</h3><p>Cybersecurity training programs delivered to nonprofit staff.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Employee volunteering</h2>
    <p class="sub">Every team member actively participates in our social initiatives.</p>
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">85%</div><div class="m-nl">Employee participation</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">2,500+</div><div class="m-nl">Volunteer hours</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">20+</div><div class="m-nl">Community partners</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">15</div><div class="m-nl">Employee-led initiatives</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Looking ahead</h2>
    <p class="sub">Ambitious goals for measurable impact.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-leaf"></i><h3>Carbon Neutral</h3><p>Maintain carbon-neutral operations and help clients reduce their footprint.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-people"></i><h3>5,000 Reached</h3><p>Expand digital literacy programs to reach 5,000 individuals by 2027.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-currency-euro"></i><h3>EUR 500K</h3><p>Provide in pro bono services to nonprofits by 2027.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-check2-all"></i><h3>90% Participation</h3><p>Employee volunteering target across the organization.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Partner with us<br>for good</h2>
    <p>Whether you're a nonprofit, school, or business committed to sustainability, we'd love to collaborate.</p>
    <a href="/contact.html" class="m-b">Get in touch</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
